What is the Emergency  Gnosis Body?
Did anyone use the rat team to help me test the deck?
If you die in a fight and didn't activate death resistance, you can spend one to fully heal, get full Silver Key Charge (Posse), and Max Awaker Aliemus Exalt Meters (Awaker Ultimates)
Ahh. Thanks.
I wonder if thwowi is here.
You recover one per day up to 5 if you are at less than 5.
If you buy more, you can prep more than 5 and use them to cheese big fights
Also, if you lose even after spending the Emergency Gnosis Body, you get any spent on that attempt back for free. Don't worry about wasting them.
